data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Design for speed and accuracy by placing important buttons within easy reach.
data.technical_spec: Interface design with predictive algorithms for ease of use.

data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Simplification of options to reduce decision time during navigation.
data.technical_spec: Contextual menus and dynamic content filtering.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Design accommodates the average person’s span of memory with limited information chunks.
data.technical_spec: Chunking content and progressive disclosure techniques.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Using familiar design patterns to maintain user's mental models.
data.technical_spec: Consistent UI/UX design across different platforms and devices.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Creating a visually appealing interface to enhance user perception of functionality.
data.technical_spec: High-fidelity prototypes and A/B testing for design elements.
